step.name: plan
step.action: Pick style; set swap interval; choose agent role.

step.name: warm-up
step.action: 5 min: each names one current question about the topic.

step.name: execute
step.action: Run swap timer; rotate; agent silent unless addressed.

step.name: commit
step.action: Commit at each natural milestone; co-author trailer for both participants.
step.decision-gate: If 30 min pass without a commit, pair is stuck — escalate to a third opinion.
